UG-34  UNSTAYED FLAT HEADS AND COVERS. (a) Flat heads and covers shall be designed using the formulas in this paragraph. The maximum allowable stress shall be as specified in UG-23. (b) The attachment detail factor C shall be selected based on the method of attachment in accordance with the sketches in this paragraph. (c) Openings in flat heads shall comply with UG-36 and shall be reinforced as required by UG-37. (d) When flat heads are welded, the joint shall meet the requirements of UW-13 and the weld shall be examined in accordance with UW-11, except as permitted by UW-52 for spot examination. The minimum thickness from UG-27 shall govern when it exceeds the flat head calculation. See also UG-35 for openings in flat heads.
